metadata.name: Schedule an Annual Policy Review Meeting

description: An agent needs to schedule an annual review with a life insurance client to discuss their policy and any changing needs.

nodes.task_description: Identify a list of clients due for their annual review this month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent runs a report and gets a list of clients to contact.

nodes.task_description: Contact a client to schedule a meeting.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully reaches a client and proposes a meeting.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the review in the agent's calendar and send a confirmation to the client.

expected_outcome.value: Agent books the meeting and sends a calendar invite.
